phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Stade Toulousain match tickets
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je acheter des billets pour un match du Stade Toulousain ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh ash-TAY day bee-YAY poor un MATCH doo STAD too-loo-ZAN
phrases.cultural_note: Stade Toulousain (often called 'le Stade') is France's most successful rugby club, with multiple European and French championship titles.

responses.english: Online or at the stadium ticket office.
responses.phonetic: ahn LEE-nyuh oo oh gee-SHAY doo STAHD
responses.local: En ligne ou au guichet du stade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which section has the best atmosphere
phrases.text_local: Dans quelle tribune l'ambiance est-elle la meilleure ?
phrases.pronunciation: dahn kel tree-BYOON lahm-BYAHNS eh-TEL lah may-YUR
phrases.cultural_note: The south stand (Tribune Sud) is traditionally where the most passionate Stade Toulousain supporters gather.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the club shop is open on non-match days
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que la boutique officielle est ouverte les jours sans match ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lah boo-TEEK oh-fee-SYEL eh oo-VAIR lay ZHOOR sahn MATCH
phrases.cultural_note: The Stade Toulousain club shop sells official merchandise including the iconic red and black jersey.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time kick-off is for the Top 14 match
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est le coup d'envoi du match de Top 14 ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur eh luh koo dahn-VWAH doo MATCH duh TOP kah-TORZ
phrases.cultural_note: Top 14 is France's top professional rugby union competition; Stade Toulousain are perennial contenders for the top positions.

responses.phonetic: luh KOO dahn-VWAH eh tah vahn-tay-OON UR
responses.local: Le coup d'envoi est à vingt et une heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the stadium by tram
phrases.text_local: Comment puis-je me rendre au stade en tramway ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN PWEE-zhuh muh RAHN-druh oh STAD ahn tram-WAY
phrases.cultural_note: Toulouse's tram line T1 stops close to the stadium; it is the recommended way to travel on match days to avoid parking congestion.

responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY lah LEE-nyuh duh TRAM TAY-UHN
responses.local: Prenez la ligne de tram T1.
